blended.narrative: Spirit Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 10 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
